title: Kyutai Moshiko MLX Q4 Model Card
citation: Kyutai. Moshiko MLX Q4 model card. Hugging Face. Accessed 2026-05-06.
permitted_uses: Planning and local research evidence source for a developer-only Moshi MLX q4 full-duplex voice candidate.
claims_supported: The model card identifies the model license as CC-BY-4.0.
The model card describes a Moshi speech-text model adapted to MLX for Mac and quantized to 4 bits.
The model card positions the model as a research artifact and cautions against professional-duty use.
The Hugging Face API metadata captured on 2026-05-06 reports source revision 18e4df760a34d5977a34517d7d1580e07acbb2f1 and lists model.q4.safetensors.
claims_not_supported: That the model is clinically validated for medical education.
That the model may be used for production clinical simulation without separate legal, safety, and clinical review.
That the model has been downloaded, benchmarked, or connected to OpenClinXR runtime evidence.
